title: Buttery Vietnamese Rice Noodles Pho
description: A rich, savory, and aromatic monsoon-inspired dish featuring Thai holy basil and fermented kimchi, perfect for a flexitarian-friendly dinner.

ingredients.name: Rice Noodles
ingredients.notes: preferably fresh or refrigerated, not frozen

instructions: Bring the beef broth to a simmer in a large pot over medium heat.
In a separate pan, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add 2 cloves of minced garlic to the butter and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add 2 cups of sliced onions to the butter and cook for 3-4 minutes, until translucent.
